rows.notes: Description from gemini-flash is a more accurate transcription of the Latin text visible in the image. Both extractors agreed on no monetary amounts for this header.
Visual inspection confirms gemini-flash's description 'Kenton ad Fest: annu:' and amounts (£4, s4, d4). gpt-5-mini incorrectly read the name as 'Weston' and shillings as '11'.
Visual inspection confirms gemini-flash's description and amounts (£2, s4, d4). gpt-5-mini incorrectly read pounds as '4' and shillings as '2'.
Full consensus across all extractors for description and amounts.

rows.description: Yardington Rect: pro Dim: an: ad Mich:
rows.notes: Consensus on amounts (£5, s0, d0). gemini-flash's description 'Yardington Rect: pro Dim: an: ad Mich:' is more accurate, particularly 'Dim' and 'Mich'.
Consensus on amounts (£8, s14, d5, 0.5). gemini-flash's description '- Tenem: pro an:' is more accurate, including the leading dash and 'an:'.
Consensus on amounts (£5, s0, d10). gemini-flash's description 'Wilmott pro Bien:' is more accurate and complete.
Visual inspection confirms gemini-flash's amounts (£0, s6, d3). gpt-5-mini incorrectly read pounds as '13', shillings as '19', and erroneously identified a '3/4' fraction where none exists.

Visual inspection confirms gemini-flash's description 'Headington Mills pro an:' and amounts (£13, s19, d3, 0.75). gpt-5-mini misidentified the place as 'Kidlington' and read incorrect amounts (£6, s19, d8) without the fraction.
Consensus on amounts (£6, s19, d8). gemini-flash's description 'Garsington Sadler pro an:' is more accurate than gpt-5-mini's 'Garrington Lodge'.

Visual inspection confirms gemini-flash's description '- Molineux Ditto' and amounts (£6, s19, d8). gpt-5-mini incorrectly read the name as 'Mohneux' and amounts as (£10, s9, d11) with an erroneous '1/4' fraction.

Visual inspection confirms gemini-flash's description 'Tintinhell Napper pro Bien:' and amounts (£10, s9, d11, 0.25). gpt-5-mini misidentified the place as 'Tintinhull Nesper' and read incorrect amounts (£1, s15, d0).
Visual inspection confirms gemini-flash's amounts (£1, s15, d0). gpt-5-mini incorrectly read amounts as (£26, s14, d6) with an erroneous '1/2' fraction.
Visual inspection confirms gemini-flash's description 'Clifton Ferry' and amounts (£26, s14, d6, 0.5). gpt-5-mini misidentified 'Ferry' as 'Gorry' and read incorrect amounts (£2, s1, d4).
Visual inspection confirms gemini-flash's description 'South New: Tenem: pro an:' and amounts (£2, s1, d4). gpt-5-mini incorrectly read amounts as (£5, s9, d7) with an erroneous '1/2' fraction.
Visual inspection confirms gemini-flash's description 'Banyston pro an:' and amounts (£5, s9, d7, 0.5). gpt-5-mini misidentified the place as 'Bennington' and read incorrect amounts (£3, s6, d8).

Visual inspection confirms gemini-flash's description 'Ledclone Cornyn pro an:' and amounts (£9, s6, d8). gpt-5-mini misidentified the place as 'Lodsacre Conway' and read incorrect amounts (£6, s13, d4).
Description agreed by both extractors. Visual inspection confirms gemini-flash's pounds value '6', while shillings '13' and pence '4' were agreed upon by both extractors.
Description agreed by both extractors. Visual inspection confirms gemini-flash's amounts (£1, s13, d4). gpt-5-mini incorrectly read amounts as (£5, s14, d3).

Visual inspection confirms gemini-flash's description 'Gaylor upper Lost pro an:' and amounts (£5, s14, d5). gpt-5-mini misidentified the name as 'Taylor, major' and read incorrect amounts (£4, s9, d3) with an erroneous '1/2' fraction.
